<!--
  Opened from the Tagging Schema Browser preset detail panel or filled manually.

  Issues with `cursor-override` and `missing-inheritance-override` trigger
  `.github/workflows/cursor-override-automation.yml`, which comments `@cursor`
  so a cloud agent can merge the YAML snapshot into
  `src/data/missing-inheritance-overrides.yaml` and open a PR.

  Requires the Cursor GitHub app on this repository.
-->

## Missing inheritance override

> **You** — submitted this override from the Tagging Schema Browser.
> **Tagging Schema Browser** — generated this issue body with the YAML snapshot.
> **Cursor agent** — will merge the snapshot into the override file in a separate PR.

_Submit to trigger a Cursor cloud agent. The agent opens a PR with `Closes #<issue-number>` and label `schema-override` (auto-merges after CI). Follow `.cursor/skills/apply-schema-override/SKILL.md`._

_Paste the pre-filled body from the browser when opening from a preset detail panel._
